passes.title: Boston By Foot
passes.benefit_text:
This is a printable pass.
If you are unable to print this pass at home or present it on a mobile device at the museum, you can come to the library to request a printed copy.
Admission is HALF price for up to four (4) people.
Advance tickets/reservations are highly recommended, especially during weekends, holidays and school vacation weeks.

Advance tickets/reservations are highly recommended, especially during weekends, holidays and school vacation weeks.

passes.title: Boston Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text:
This pass gives 50% off tickets for up to four people. You will receive the code after booking the pass.
Please check https://www.bostonharborislands.org/ferryschedule/ for the ferry you are looking for to ensure it is running on the day you are booking. Each ferry has a different schedule.
source_phrases: This pass gives 50% off tickets for up to four people. You will receive the code after booking the pass.
Please check https://www.bostonharborislands.org/ferryschedule/ for the ferry you are looking for to ensure it is running on the day you are booking. Each ferry has a different schedule.

passes.title: Boston Harbor Island Ferry
passes.benefit_text:
This pass provides 50% off admission for the immediate family/household.
Please visit The Children's Piazza website to make a reservation prior to your visit. Reservations always encouraged - walk in play subject to availability
This is a printable pass.
source_phrases: This pass provides 50% off admission for the immediate family/household.
Please visit The Children's Piazza website to make a reservation prior to your visit. Reservations always encouraged - walk in play subject to availability
This is a printable pass.

passes.title: The Childrens Piazza
passes.benefit_text: This pass offers $5 off admission to the Concord Museum for up to 4 people.
source_phrases: This pass offers $5 off admission to the Concord Museum for up to 4 people.

passes.title: Concord Museum
passes.benefit_text:
This pass admits 3 visitors at 1/2 price admission per person; any additional visitors must pay the regular admission price.
Advance reservations are no longer accepted. Present this pass to Admissions staff when checking in and the discount will be applied to the cost of your visit.
source_phrases: This pass admits 3 visitors at 1/2 price admission per person; any additional visitors must pay the regular admission price.
Advance reservations are no longer accepted. Present this pass to Admissions staff when checking in and the discount will be applied to the cost of your visit.

passes.title: The Discovery Museums
passes.benefit_text:
This pass provides a 50% discount for up to 2 adults and 2 children. Children under 2 free. It is not to be combined with other offers, group rates or special event prices. Please fill out the reverse side of the coupon pass prior to using.
*This is a coupon pass that must be picked up at the library
source_phrases: This pass provides a 50% discount for up to 2 adults and 2 children. Children under 2 free. It is not to be combined with other offers, group rates or special event prices. Please fill out the reverse side of the coupon pass prior to using.
*This is a coupon pass that must be picked up at the library

passes.title: Ecotarium
passes.benefit_text:
With this pass, one adult 50% discounted admission
With this pass, children (ages 5-17) $1.00 admission
No discounts on classes, tours, or retail items
The Garden is open mid-April to October 15
Check website (http://www.nativeplanttrust.org/visit/garden-woods/) for exact dates & hours before visiting
*This pass needs to be picked up at and returned to Reading Public Library

passes.title: Garden In The Woods Native Plant Trust
passes.benefit_text:
50% off regular museum admission rates for up to four people.
This pass also includes admission to the Harvard Museum of Natural History, the Peabody Museum of Archaeology and Ethnology, the Harvard Museum of the Ancient Near East, and the Collection of Historical Scientific Instruments.
Please be prepared to show the physical library pass and proof of Massachusetts residency when visiting the museum. Only one member of the party must be a MA resident.
*This is a coupon pass that must be picked up at the library

Please be prepared to show the physical library pass and proof of Massachusetts residency when visiting the museum. Only one member of the party must be a MA resident.

passes.title: Harvard Museum Of Natural History
passes.benefit_text:
This pass offers free admission for two adults and children under 18 to 38 historic sites and the Library and Archives of Historic New England. Please go to historicnewengland.org for a full listing of historic sites to visit and to verify hours of operation.
This pass needs to be picked up at the library
source_phrases: This pass offers free admission for two adults and children under 18 to 38 historic sites and the Library and Archives of Historic New England. Please go to historicnewengland.org for a full listing of historic sites to visit and to verify hours of operation.
This pass needs to be picked up at the library

passes.title: Historic New England
source_phrases: Each pass allows up to two people a discounted rate of $10 each. The ICA is always free to children 18 and under.
Current hours and admission information are available at: https://www.icaboston.org/visit/
Reservations are encouraged, but not required.

passes.title: Institute Of Contemporary Art Boston
passes.benefit_text:
Each pass provides up to 4 people with $5.00 admission per person. Children under the age of 18 are always admitted free.
Tickets can sell out fast, and may not be available at the door, particularly during popular days of the week and times of day. Buy your tickets in advance to avoid the line and guarantee entrance at your preferred time. See confirmation email for instructions.
source_phrases: Each pass provides up to 4 people with $5.00 admission per person. Children under the age of 18 are always admitted free.

Tickets can sell out fast, and may not be available at the door, particularly during popular days of the week and times of day. Buy your tickets in advance to avoid the line and guarantee entrance at your preferred time. See confirmation email for instructions.

passes.title: Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
passes.benefit_text: Passes are no longer required—the presentation of a valid library card grants the cardholder 50% off of one admission ticket—but please place a reservation for the desired date of your visit.
source_phrases: Passes are no longer required—the presentation of a valid library card grants the cardholder 50% off of one admission ticket—but please place a reservation for the desired date of your visit.

passes.title: John F Kennedy Library And Museum
passes.benefit_text:
This pass provides free parking to one vehicle at over 50 facilities in the state parks system. 
*This pass needs to be picked up at and returned to Reading Public Library
source_phrases: This pass provides free parking to one vehicle at over 50 facilities in the state parks system.
*This pass needs to be picked up at and returned to Reading Public Library

passes.title: Massachusetts State Parks Department Of Conservation And Recreation
passes.benefit_text:
This pass uses a discount code. You will receive the discount code via email after booking this pass.
Children 6 and under are admitted free. The pass allows admission for 2 adults at $15 each and up to 4 children ages 7–17 at $10 each. Tickets to the MFA are always free for visitors under seven years old.
source_phrases: This pass uses a discount code. You will receive the discount code via email after booking this pass.

Children 6 and under are admitted free. The pass allows admission for 2 adults at $15 each and up to 4 children ages 7–17 at $10 each. Tickets to the MFA are always free for visitors under seven years old.

passes.title: Museum Of Fine Arts
passes.benefit_text:
This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free.
Your Library pass can only be used on the date listed on the pass.
Please bring your library pass confirmation (printed or displayed on a phone) when you visit.
When you arrive at the Museum, stop at the Box Office to exchange your library pass and purchase your Exhibit Halls tickets at the discounted rate. If you have any questions or would like to reserve your Exhibit Halls passes in advance to avoid waiting in line the day of your visit, please call 617-723-2500 (9:00 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. daily).
If you are unable to show your Library confirmation on a phone, you may print out a copy using the link in the confirmation email or request a paper copy from the library.
source_phrases: This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free.
Your Library pass can only be used on the date listed on the pass.
Please bring your library pass confirmation (printed or displayed on a phone) when you visit.

When you arrive at the Museum, stop at the Box Office to exchange your library pass and purchase your Exhibit Halls tickets at the discounted rate. If you have any questions or would like to reserve your Exhibit Halls passes in advance to avoid waiting in line the day of your visit, please call 617-723-2500 (9:00 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. daily).
If you are unable to show your Library confirmation on a phone, you may print out a copy using the link in the confirmation email or request a paper copy from the library.

passes.title: Museum Of Science
passes.benefit_text:
Starting JUNE 1 this is a digital pass.
Each pass admits up to 4 people at 50% off the rate of admission.
You may find current rates by viewing https://www.neaq.org/visit/tickets/
Passes do not apply to Aquarium boat programs, IMAX shows or school group visits.
Advance reservations are no longer required for library patrons with coupons. Library patrons should present their discount pass on-site at the Aquarium ticket booth. Once tickets are issued, library patrons will be admitted to the Aquarium.
source_phrases: Starting JUNE 1 this is a digital pass.
Each pass admits up to 4 people at 50% off the rate of admission.
You may find current rates by viewing https://www.neaq.org/visit/tickets/
Passes do not apply to Aquarium boat programs, IMAX shows or school group visits.

Advance reservations are no longer required for library patrons with coupons. Library patrons should present their discount pass on-site at the Aquarium ticket booth. Once tickets are issued, library patrons will be admitted to the Aquarium.

passes.title: New England Aquarium
passes.benefit_text:
Library passes for North Shore Children's Museum admit up to 5 people (adults and children over 12 months) at 50% off admission price. 
This is an ePass that can either be presented on a mobile device or as a print-out to receive the discounted admission rate in-person.
source_phrases: Library passes for North Shore Children's Museum admit up to 5 people (adults and children over 12 months) at 50% off admission price.
This is an ePass that can either be presented on a mobile device or as a print-out to receive the discounted admission rate in-person.

passes.title: North Shore Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Please check hours for each location on PaddleBoston's website - boat launches are weather permitting.
The pass is valid for one boat rental.  Passholder must present pass and photo ID at rental desk.
This includes: Any type of single kayak or paddleboard (1 person), double kayaks (2 adults), standard canoes (up to 3 adults, or 2 adults and 2 children), and XL canoes (up to 5 adults).
Save time by filling out your waiver ahead of time: paddleboston.com/waiver.
Valid at all seven locations: Stoneham, Medford, Somerville, Boston, Cambridge, Newton, Waltham.
source_phrases: Please check hours for each location on PaddleBoston's website - boat launches are weather permitting.
The pass is valid for one boat rental.  Passholder must present pass and photo ID at rental desk.
This includes: Any type of single kayak or paddleboard (1 person), double kayaks (2 adults), standard canoes (up to 3 adults, or 2 adults and 2 children), and XL canoes (up to 5 adults).
Save time by filling out your waiver ahead of time: paddleboston.com/waiver.
Valid at all seven locations: Stoneham, Medford, Somerville, Boston, Cambridge, Newton, Waltham.

passes.title: Paddle Boston
passes.benefit_text:
This pass uses a discount code. You will receive the discount code via email after booking this pass. Purchasing tickets in advance is recommended. See confirmation email for instructions.
Pass admits two adults at $12 per person.  Includes admission to the Yin Yu Tang, the Chinese house. Access to special ticketed exhibitions also require a separate fee. Visitors using a library pass are not entitled to any other member benefits.
source_phrases: This pass uses a discount code. You will receive the discount code via email after booking this pass. Purchasing tickets in advance is recommended. See confirmation email for instructions.

Pass admits two adults at $12 per person.  Includes admission to the Yin Yu Tang, the Chinese house. Access to special ticketed exhibitions also require a separate fee. Visitors using a library pass are not entitled to any other member benefits.

passes.title: Peabody Essex Museum
passes.benefit_text:
This pass provides a discounted on Heritage Passes, Combination Passes, and Plimoth Patuxet Only Passes of $18 per adult and $12 per child ages 5-17, for up to 6 people.
Patrons are not able to purchase tickets online, this pass must be presented at the museum for the discount.

Patrons are not able to purchase tickets online, this pass must be presented at the museum for the discount.

passes.title: Plimoth Patuxet Museums
passes.benefit_text:
This pass allows the bearer a discounted admission rate ($13.25 for adults, $10.75 for children ages 3-14) for up to six visitors. 
You must purchase tickets from the museum ahead of time. See confirmation email for instructions.
*This pass needs to be picked up at and returned to Reading Public Library
NOT AVAILABLE IN OCTOBER

passes.title: The Trustees Of The Reservations
passes.benefit_text:
This pass allows free admission to the museum for up to 9 people per day. 
As of Feb 1, 2026, this pass will admit up to 5 people per day.
This is a printable pass.
You must be able to print this pass at home or present it on a mobile device at the museum.

As of Feb 1, 2026, this pass will admit up to 5 people per day.
This is a printable pass.
You must be able to print this pass at home or present it on a mobile device at the museum.

passes.title: The Uss Constitution Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Pass is valid for Franklin Park Zoo in Boston and Stone Zoo in Stoneham, MA.
Admits 6 people at $9.00 per adult and $6.00 per child. Children 2 years and younger are free.
Note: This pass is no longer an online discount code- it is a coupon pass that must be picked up at the library. To use the library discount, you must present the physical library ticket at the Zoo's admission booth. Reservations are not required for this discount.
Library passes may be used for general daytime admission only. They cannot be used for the evening Boston Lights or ZooLights events.
